## Problem Statement

What problem would this feature solve? Ex: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternative Approaches

What alternatives have you considered?

## Use Case

Describe the concrete development workflow this would improve.

## Impact

- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Usability
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] New capability
- [ ] Editor integration

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, references, or examples here.
